selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: n. 兔子；vi. 猎兔
words.definition: n. any of various burrowing animals of the family Leporidae having long ears and short tails; some domesticated and raised for pets or food

words.translation: a. 坏的；n. 坏
words.definition: a. having undesirable or negative qualities

words.translation: n. 故事, 小说, 传奇, 描述, 阅历, 经历, 层
words.definition: n. a piece of fiction that narrates a chain of related events

words.translation: n. 枪
words.definition: n. a weapon that discharges a missile at high velocity (especially from a metal tube or barrel)

words.translation: n. 孔, 洞, 穴, 漏洞；vt. 挖洞, 掘坑
words.definition: n. an opening into or through something

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: r. from a particular thing or place or position (`forth' is obsolete)

words.translation: adv. 在后地；prep. 在...背后
words.definition: r. in or to or toward the rear

words.translation: n. 母亲, 修女院长；vt. 产生, 照看, 收养
words.definition: n. a woman who has given birth to a child (also used as a term of address to your mother)

words.translation: n. 过去, 昔时, 往事, 早年经历, 过去时；a. 过去的, 结束的, 卸任的, 过去时的
words.definition: n. the time that has elapsed

words.translation: n. 街道, 马路, 街区；a. 街道的
words.definition: n. a thoroughfare (usually including sidewalks) that is lined with buildings

words.translation: n. 尾部, 后部, 辫子, 随员, 特务, 燕尾服, 踪迹, 限定继承(权)；a. 在后面的, 从后面而来的, 限定继承的, 尾部的, 后部的
words.definition: n. the posterior part of the body of a vertebrate especially when elongated and extending beyond the trunk or main part of the body

words.translation: n. 鸟, 羽毛球；vi. 打鸟
words.definition: n. warm-blooded egg-laying vertebrates characterized by feathers and forelimbs modified as wings

words.translation: a. 凶猛的, 猛烈的, 热烈的, 暴躁的
words.definition: s. marked by extreme intensity of emotions or convictions; inclined to react violently; fervid

words.translation: a. 美好的, 和蔼的, 正派的, 做得好的, 精密的, 细微的, 挑剔的, 谨慎的
words.definition: a. pleasant or pleasing or agreeable in nature or appearance

words.translation: adv. 请；vt. 使高兴, 合...的心意, 取悦
words.definition: r. used in polite request

words.translation: a. 忧愁的, 悲哀的
words.definition: a. experiencing or showing sorrow or unhappiness

words.translation: a. 好笑的, 有趣的, 滑稽的；n. 滑稽人物
words.definition: s. experiencing odd bodily sensations

words.translation: n. 作家, 作家的著作, 创始人
n. 计划, 设计, 事业；vt. 计划, 设计, 投掷, 发射, 使凸出, 放映
words.definition: n. a planned undertaking

words.translation: adv. 严重地, 恶劣地, 极度地
words.definition: r. to a severe or serious degree

words.translation: n. 大会, 协定, 惯例, 约定
words.definition: n. a large formal assembly

words.translation: a. 温和的, 文雅的
words.definition: s. soft and mild; not harsh or stern or severe

words.translation: n. 伦敦
words.definition: n. the capital and largest city of England; located on the Thames in southeastern England; financial and industrial and cultural center

words.translation: n. 故事, 谎言, 谣言, 陈述, 叙述
n. 长椅子；[机] 台
words.definition: n. a long seat for more than one person

words.translation: 及其他, 等等
a. 赠予的, 沉溺的, 约定的；give的过去分词
words.definition: s. acknowledged as a supposition

words.translation: 有限的
vi. 逐渐消失, 逐渐减少
n. 英国
n. 约克郡；约克王朝
words.definition: n. the English royal house (a branch of the Plantagenet line) that reigned from 1461 to 1485; its emblem was a white rose
